tournaments.name: FIFA World Cup 2026
tournaments.summary: Global men’s national-team football tournament. Link out to the official event hub for fixtures, tickets, team info and participation pathways.

tournaments.name: ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026
tournaments.summary: International women’s T20 cricket showcase. A strong hook for new fans to find cricket bodies, local clubs and official pathways.

tournaments.name: Aichi-Nagoya Asian Games 2026
tournaments.summary: Major multi-sport event across Asia. Good discovery point for sports people may not normally see on mainstream coverage.

tournaments.name: Men’s Rugby World Cup 2027
tournaments.summary: Australia-hosted international rugby showcase and a natural opportunity to send visitors towards local union, touch, sevens and wheelchair rugby pathways.

tournaments.name: FIBA Basketball World Cup 2027
tournaments.summary: International basketball world cup. Directs fans to official basketball news, rules, pathways and national bodies.

players.name: Football participation pathways
players.feature_reason: World Cup interest often turns into local club enquiries.
players.bio: Use official bodies first: FIFA for global context, then national and local member associations for clubs, coaches, futsal, women’s football, junior football and adapted programs.

career_stats.pathways: club, futsal, school, social, coaching, officiating

accomplishments: Useful for players, volunteers, fans, officials and coaches

players.name: Cricket participation pathways
players.feature_reason: Major cricket events create a good moment to connect new fans with local cricket programs.
players.bio: Use ICC for global competitions and rankings, then national cricket bodies for local clubs, junior formats, women and girls programs, umpiring and volunteering.

career_stats.pathways: club, indoor, social, junior, coaching, umpiring
career_stats.accessibility: ask local bodies about inclusive formats

accomplishments: Useful for players, families, fans, officials and volunteers

players.name: Para sport pathways
players.feature_reason: The site mission is to make sport easier to find whatever someone’s situation.
players.bio: Start with Paralympic and national disability-sport bodies to find classification guidance, sports options, local clubs and pathway information.
accomplishments: Useful for participants with disability, carers, clubs and volunteers

events.name: Official FIBA Basketball World Cup 2027 hub

sport_bodies.name: Australian Sports Directory
sport_bodies.summary: Australian Sports Commission directory for recognised national sporting organisations and disability sporting organisations.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Best first stop for Australians looking for an official national body, disability sport body, club pathway or contact point.

sport_bodies.name: Play Well — Australia’s Sport Participation Strategy
sport_bodies.summary: Participation strategy focused on safe, welcoming, inclusive and enjoyable sporting environments.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful framing for clubs and sports bodies that want to grow participation beyond elite pathways.

sport_bodies.name: Play by the Rules
sport_bodies.summary: Resources for safe, fair and inclusive sport, including inclusion and diversity guidance for clubs and associations.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Helpful for volunteers, administrators and coaches who want practical inclusion tools.

sport_bodies.name: IOC Recognised International Federations
sport_bodies.summary: IOC list of recognised international sports federations that govern sports at world level.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Good global index when someone wants to find the official international body for a sport.

sport_bodies.name: FIFA
sport_bodies.summary: Official global football body and tournament hub.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Use FIFA for global tournament context, then follow national association links for local participation.

sport_bodies.name: International Cricket Council
sport_bodies.summary: Official home for international cricket events, scores, rankings and news.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Use ICC for global cricket context, then national boards for clubs, schools and volunteer pathways.

sport_bodies.name: World Rugby
sport_bodies.summary: Official global rugby union body with tournaments, rankings, education and player welfare resources.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Strong fit for players, coaches, match officials and welfare-focused club volunteers.

sport_bodies.name: FIBA Basketball
sport_bodies.summary: Official FIBA hub for basketball events, rankings, rules and member federation information.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for connecting fans with basketball rules, competitions and national bodies.

sport_bodies.name: World Athletics
sport_bodies.summary: Official global athletics hub for running, jumping, throwing, walking, records and events.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Broad participation appeal because athletics includes school, club, masters, road running and officiating pathways.

sport_bodies.name: World Aquatics
sport_bodies.summary: Official global home for swimming, diving, water polo, artistic swimming, open water and high diving.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for families and participants exploring pool, open-water and aquatic club options.

sport_bodies.name: World Tennis / ITF
sport_bodies.summary: Official international tennis body, including tours, rules, rankings, wheelchair tennis and development resources.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for tennis pathways across juniors, social tennis, wheelchair tennis, officials and coaches.

sport_bodies.name: International Paralympic Committee
sport_bodies.summary: Official Paralympic movement hub for Para sport news, events, classification and results.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Core pathway link for inclusive sport, classification awareness and Para sport discovery.

sport_bodies.name: World Wheelchair Rugby
sport_bodies.summary: Official governing body for wheelchair rugby.
sport_bodies.participation_note: A strong example of a high-energy pathway for athletes with disability and volunteers interested in Para sport.
